triggered_rules: Hreflang errors across locales → multi-locale EU traffic bleed

tickets.title: sitemap.xml — Generate a sitemap (Next.js app router supports `sitemap.ts`).
tickets.fix: Generate a sitemap (Next.js app router supports `sitemap.ts`).
tickets.label: fixable-in-place

tickets.title: canonical link — Emit a self-referential `<link rel='canonical'>` via metadata.
tickets.fix: Emit a self-referential `<link rel='canonical'>` via metadata.
acceptance: Every indexable page emits a self-referential `<link rel="canonical">`
Canonical URL uses the clean-domain host and correct locale
tickets.label: fixable-in-place

tickets.title: hreflang coverage — Emit hreflang for every locale route + x-default.
tickets.problem: Current: `0 of 8 locales`. Target: `8 hreflang tags + x-default`.
tickets.fix: Emit hreflang for every locale route + x-default.
acceptance: All configured locales emit `<link rel="alternate" hreflang=...>`
tickets.label: fixable-in-place

tickets.title: h1 count — Ensure exactly one h1 per route; demote duplicates to h2.
tickets.problem: Current: `0 h1 tags`. Target: `exactly 1 h1 per page`.
tickets.fix: Ensure exactly one h1 per route; demote duplicates to h2.
acceptance: h1 text reflects the page's primary entity
tickets.label: fixable-in-place

tickets.title: JSON-LD — Inject JSON-LD for the page's primary entity type.
tickets.problem: Current: `none`. Target: `relevant schema.org types (Organization, WebSite, Product, FAQ)`.
tickets.fix: Inject JSON-LD for the page's primary entity type.
acceptance: Relevant schema.org type(s) emitted as application/ld+json
tickets.label: fixable-in-place
